specFidelityNotes: Diff vs origin/main (19fb6189) for #405 replaces the Settings placeholder with domain-grouped workflow templates, editable thresholds, validation, Save/Discard, unsaved navigation dialog, save retry, and read-only FBT/unresolved fields. settings* keys append to MutableMockState; Manual Refresh reset covered via demo-shell DEFAULT_MUTABLE_MOCK_STATE. Vietnamese labels, tablist/tabpanel a11y, and touch-target CSS follow demo conventions. Optional contextual-assistance checkbox (dynamic template/threshold context in shell host) is only static path copy today — not in numbered ACs and does not contradict stretch scope.

smells.name: Large Class
smells.hunk: ~500 lines of workflow template + threshold fixture records in one module

convention_notes.standard: apps/demo/MODULE.md invariants — Vietnamese copy, touch targets, focus-visible
convention_notes.note: Settings styles reuse --juli-touch-target, :focus-visible, and responsive breakpoints consistent with demo-shell contract tests.
